question: Does ABBA have similar gender configuration to The Mamas & The Papas?
context: ABBA was a Swedish pop group composed of four members.
The Mamas & The Papas was an American band composed of four members.
The members of ABBA are Björn Ulvaeus (male), Benny Andersson (male), Agnetha Fältskog (female), and Anni-Frid Lyngstad (female)..
The members of The Mamas & The Papas are John Phillips (male), Denny Doherty (male), Cass Elliot (female), and Michelle Phillips (female).
response:
<reasoning>
ABBA has two male members and two female members.
The Mamas & The Papas has two male members and two female members.
The gender configuration of ABBA is two males and two females.
The gender configuration of The Mamas & The Papas is two males and two females.
The gender configuration of ABBA is the same as that of The Mamas & The Papas.
<answer> Yes
